name: Cocoa Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up enough bread into a greased casserole dish to fill it 2/3 full.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together 2/3 cup sugar and 2 heaping tablespoons of cocoa until combined.
3. Toss the mixed sugar and cocoa evenly over the bread to coat it lightly.
4. In another bowl, beat the eggs (or egg whites) well and stir in 1 teaspoon vanilla.
5. Pour the milk mixture over the bread, ensuring it covers all pieces.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes.
Serve with milk... or with a lump of butter melting into the nice warm pudding. Or with Cool Whip, etc.
